project_type: Android app (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose) with Laravel PHP API backend
build_system: Gradle (app), no build for PHP controllers (just file edits)
build_command: Not applicable - AST/syntax validation only (sandbox cannot run Gradle Android build)
verification_instructions: Verify Kotlin files have valid syntax by checking for compilation errors patterns. Verify PHP files have valid syntax with php -l. Verify logical correctness by code review.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - direct file edits to Kotlin and PHP source files
environment_constraints: Cannot run Android Gradle build (no Android SDK). Cannot run Laravel app (no database). Validation is limited to syntax checking and code review.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns. Use Gson for JSON serialization. Use Jetpack Compose for UI. Use StateFlow for state management.
key_patterns: ViewModels use StateFlow with UiState data classes. Repositories wrap API calls with Result<T>. Screens use Scaffold with TopAppBar. API endpoints defined in ApiService.kt interface. Routes defined in routes/api.php. Controllers in Controllers/ directory.
directory_structure: MysticNusa/ - Android app with standard MVVM architecture. Controllers/ - Laravel API controllers. routes/ - Laravel route definitions.
